source: Additional fields (address, notes, etc.) can be edited after creating the contact.
target: Oqsma addizzjonali (indirizz, noti, eċċ.) jistgħu jiġu editjati wara li toħloq il-kuntatt.

source: All logged-in users can view this document
target: L-utenti kollha li dħalu jistgħu jaraw dan id-dokument

source: Bookmark limit reached (12). Remove a bookmark to add another.
target: Il-limitu tal-bukkmarks intlaħaq (12). Neħħi bukkmark biex iżżid ieħor.

source: Could not add user. Please try again.
target: Ma stajtx jiżdied l-utent. Jekk jogħġbok erġa' pprova.

source: Create a contact or adjust your filters
target: Oħloq kuntatt jew ibdel il-filtri tiegħek

source: This will remove all recent items. Continue?
target: Dan se jneħħi l-oġġetti riċenti kollha. Kompli?

source: Failed to generate link. Please try again.
target: Ma rnexxiex jiġi ġġenerat il-link. Jekk jogħġbok erġa' pprova.

source: Install Orga, Micro, or other apps to see cross-app context for your contacts.
target: Installa Orga, Micro, jew apps oħra biex tara l-kuntest bejn l-apps għall-kuntatti tiegħek.

source: Organization settings updated — reload to apply
target: L-issettjar tal-organizzazzjoni ġew aġġornati — erġa' agħbbi biex tapplika

source: Search by name, email, or phone…
Sort: A–Z — click for last modified
Sort: last modified — click for A–Z
target: Issortja: l-aħħar modifika — ikklikkja għal A–Ż

source: This link has expired. Please ask the sender for a new link.
target: Dan il-link skada. Jekk jogħġbok itlob link ġdid mingħand min bagħtu.

source: This link is invalid or has been removed.
target: Dan il-link mhuwiex validu jew tneħħa.

source: Your timer has been running for {0}
Delete this event? This cannot be undone.
target: Ħassar dan l-avveniment? Dan ma jistax jiġi reversjat.

source: View full details in the source app
Configure Frappe Manager to enable one-click updates.
target: Ikkonfigura Frappe Manager biex tattiva l-aġġornamenti b'klikk waħda.

source: Remove {0}? This will uninstall the app and may affect data.
target: Neħħi {0}? Dan se jneħħi l-app u jista' jaffettwa d-data.

source: Update {0} from v{1} to {2}? This will restart Frappe.
target: Aġġorna {0} minn v{1} għal {2}? Dan se jerġa' jibda Frappe.

source: Activity will appear here as you and your team work across ecosystem apps.
target: L-attività se tidher hawnhekk hekk kif int u t-tim tiegħek taħdmu fl-apps tal-ekosistema.

source: Add a note to keep track of details about this contact.
target: Żid nota biex iżżomm kont tad-dettalji dwar dan il-kuntatt.

source: Address is not linked to this contact
target: L-indirizz mhuwiex marbut ma' dan il-kuntatt

source: Address line 1, city, and country are required
target: Linja tal-indirizz 1, belt, u pajjiż huma meħtieġa

source: Both proposed start and end times are required.
target: Iż-żewġ ħinijiet proposti tal-bidu u t-tmiem huma meħtieġa.
Ma tistax tirrevoka s-sessjoni kurrenti tiegħek

source: Country '{0}' not found. Please select a valid country.
target: Il-pajjiż '{0}' ma nstabx. Jekk jogħġbok agħżel pajjiż validu.

source: Create a contact to get started
End time was before start time. Adjusted to 1 hour after start.
target: Il-ħin tat-tmiem kien qabel il-ħin tal-bidu. Ġie aġġustat għal siegħa wara l-bidu.

source: Frappe Manager URL is not configured in Dock Settings.
target: Il-URL ta' Frappe Manager mhuwiex ikkonfigurat fl-Issettjar ta' Dock.

source: Invalid status. Must be one of: {0}
target: Status invalidu. Irid ikun wieħed minn: {0}
L-ebda kuntatti jaqblu ma' dawn il-filtri

source: No settings registered for this app.
target: L-ebda issettjar irreġistrati għal din l-app.
Il-kontenut tan-nota ma jistax ikun vojt

source: Only native Dock events can be deleted here.
target: Hawnhekk jistgħu jitħassru biss l-avvenimenti nattivi ta' Dock.

source: Only System Manager can trigger bridge sync
target: Biss is-System Manager jista' jattiva s-sync tal-bridge

source: Only System Manager can view sync logs
target: Biss is-System Manager jista' jara l-logs tas-sync

source: Only the contact owner can change the photo
target: Biss is-sid tal-kuntatt jista' jibdel ir-ritratt

source: Only the contact owner can edit this contact
target: Biss is-sid tal-kuntatt jista' jeditja dan il-kuntatt

source: Only the event organizer can send invitations.
target: Biss l-organizzatur tal-avveniment jista' jibgħat l-istedini.

source: Only the session creator or a Dock Manager can revoke sessions
target: Biss min ħoloq is-sessjoni jew Dock Manager jista' jirrevoka s-sessjonijiet

source: Pin items from any app using the bookmark button in the top bar
target: Ippinja oġġetti minn kwalunkwe app billi tuża l-buttuna tal-bukkmark fil-bar ta' fuq

source: Please fill in all password fields
target: Jekk jogħġbok imla l-oqsma kollha tal-password

source: Please log in to access Dock.
target: Jekk jogħġbok idħol biex taċċessa Dock.

source: Please respond to this invitation in the calendar
target: Jekk jogħġbok wieġeb għal din l-istedina fil-kalendarju

source: Search user by name or email…
Send an email or add a note to get started.
target: Ibgħat email jew żid nota biex tibda.

source: Sourced events can only be edited in the source app.
target: Avvenimenti minn sors jistgħu jiġu editjati biss fl-app tas-sors.

source: The settings component could not be loaded. Please reload the page.
target: Il-komponent tal-issettjar ma setax jitgħabba. Jekk jogħġbok erġa' agħbbi l-paġna.

source: This contact is archived and hidden from the People list.
target: Dan il-kuntatt huwa arkivjat u moħbi mil-lista tan-Nies.

source: This is a reminder for your upcoming event
target: Din hija tfakkira għall-avveniment li ġej tiegħek

source: This person is marked as Do Not Contact.
target: Din il-persuna hija mmarkata bħala Tikkuntattjax.

source: This record is already linked to this discussion
target: Dan ir-rekord diġà marbut ma' din id-diskussjoni

source: Timer running for {0} — did you forget?
Two-factor authentication is not enabled on this site. Contact your administrator.
target: L-awtentikazzjoni b'żewġ fatturi mhix attivata fuq dan is-sit. Ikkuntattja l-amministratur tiegħek.

source: Type at least 2 characters to search

target: Tip ta' notifika mhux magħruf '{0}' għall-app '{1}'

source: Upload files like contracts, proposals, or documents.
target: Ittellgħa fajls bħal kuntratti, proposti, jew dokumenti.

source: Write a note... (not linked to any record)
target: Ikteb nota... (mhix marbuta ma' ebda rekord)

source: You are not an attendee of this event.
target: Int m'intix attendee ta' dan l-avveniment.

source: You can have a maximum of {0} bookmarks
You can only change status of your own events.
target: Tista' biss tibdel l-istatus tal-avvenimenti tiegħek.

source: You can only delete your own comments
You can only delete your own events.
You can only edit your own events.
You can only edit your own notes
You can only manage attendees on your own events.
target: Tista' biss timmaniġġja l-attendees fuq l-avvenimenti tiegħek.

source: You can only view your own events.
You do not have permission to comment on this record
target: M'għandekx permess biex tikkummenta fuq dan ir-rekord

source: You have been invited to the following event
